characters.name: Imperio Kel
characters.appearance: Black male, athletic build, tan skin, short black hair, trimmed beard, intense eyes
characters.wardrobe: Black tactical coat with metallic gold trim

characters.name: Slipstream
characters.appearance: Black male, lean athletic sprinter build, tan skin, short black fade haircut, sharp jawline, intense dark brown eyes, youthful but battle-tested, faint crimson energy veins around his eyes when using speed.
characters.wardrobe: Black tactical coat with metallic gold trim, dark compression suit underneath, gold lightning-style accents on arms and legs, reinforced combat boots, crimson energy trails when accelerating.
characters.voice: Confident, quick-witted, charismatic, smooth baritone, speaks fast when excited but becomes calm and focused under pressure.
characters.personality: Fearless, loyal, competitive, protective, optimistic on the surface, uses humor to hide pain, impulsive when emotional, refuses to abandon people.
characters.notes: Fastest young hero in the LEVRAM universe. Connected to an extradimensional velocity field that grants super speed, accelerated perception, rapid healing, and limited time distortion. Hero-era identity before a darker future transformation into RedEye.

characters.name: SlipStream
characters.appearance: lean athletic sprinter build, tan skin, short black fade haircut, sharp jawline, intense dark brown eyes, youthful but battle-tested, faint crimson energy veins around his eyes when using speed.
characters.wardrobe: metallic gold trim, dark compression suit underneath, gold lightning-style accents on arms and legs, reinforced combat boots, crimson energy trails when accelerating.
